Module com.example._0tazo
Package com.example._0tazo.model

Class GameTest

java.lang.Object
com.example._0tazo.model.GameTest
@DisplayName("Game") class GameTest extends Object
Unit tests for Game.

Covers game setup, turn flow, player elimination, win condition, and exception throwing for illegal moves.

    private int
    findIllegalCardIndex(IPlayer player, int currentSum)
    Returns the index of the first card that would be illegal to play, or -1 if all cards are legal.
    private int
    findLegalCardIndex(IPlayer player, int currentSum)
    Returns the index of the first legally playable card in the hand, or -1 if none exists.
    private void
    forceTableSum(Game game, int targetSum)
    Forces the table sum to a specific value by directly manipulating the Table's addToSum method.

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach void setUp() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testGameOneHasTwoPlayers

      @Test @DisplayName("Game with 1 machine has 2 players total") void testGameOneHasTwoPlayers()

    • testGameThreeHasFourPlayers

      @Test @DisplayName("Game with 3 machines has 4 players total") void testGameThreeHasFourPlayers()

    • testFirstPlayerIsHuman

      @Test @DisplayName("First player is always the human") void testFirstPlayerIsHuman()

    • testRemainingPlayersAreComputers

      @Test @DisplayName("Remaining players are computer players") void testRemainingPlayersAreComputers()

    • testInvalidMachineCountThrows

      @Test @DisplayName("Invalid machine count throws IllegalArgumentException") void testInvalidMachineCountThrows()

    • testSetupDealsForCardsToEachPlayer

      @Test @DisplayName("setup() deals 4 cards to every player") void testSetupDealsForCardsToEachPlayer()

    • testSetupPlacesInitialCard

      @Test @DisplayName("setup() places initial card on the table") void testSetupPlacesInitialCard()

    • testSetupInitializesTableSum

      @Test @DisplayName("setup() initializes table sum from initial card") void testSetupInitializesTableSum()

    • testSetupReducesDeckSize

      @Test @DisplayName("setup() reduces deck size by dealt cards + 1 initial") void testSetupReducesDeckSize()

    • testFirstTurnIsHuman

      @Test @DisplayName("First turn belongs to the human player") void testFirstTurnIsHuman()

    • testNextTurnAdvances

      @Test @DisplayName("nextTurn() advances to the next player") void testNextTurnAdvances()

    • testNextTurnWrapsAround

      @Test @DisplayName("nextTurn() wraps around to first player after last") void testNextTurnWrapsAround() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testHumanPlayCardThrowsSumExceeded

      @Test @DisplayName("humanPlayCard() throws SumExceededException for illegal card") void testHumanPlayCardThrowsSumExceeded()

    • testHumanPlayCardThrowsInvalidTurn

      @Test @DisplayName("humanPlayCard() throws InvalidTurnException when it is machine\'s turn") void testHumanPlayCardThrowsInvalidTurn() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testHumanPlayCardReducesHandSize

      @Test @DisplayName("humanPlayCard() reduces human hand size by 1") void testHumanPlayCardReducesHandSize() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testComputerTurnThrowsOnHumanTurn

      @Test @DisplayName("computerTakeTurn() throws InvalidTurnException on human\'s turn") void testComputerTurnThrowsOnHumanTurn()

    • testComputerTurnKeepsHandSize

      @Test @DisplayName("computerTakeTurn() keeps machine hand at 4 cards after play and draw") void testComputerTurnKeepsHandSize() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testEliminationWhenNoLegalMove

      @Test @DisplayName("checkCurrentPlayerElimination() eliminates player with no legal move") void testEliminationWhenNoLegalMove() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testEliminateRemovesPlayer

      @Test @DisplayName("eliminateCurrentPlayer() removes player from the list") void testEliminateRemovesPlayer() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testEliminateCardsGoToDeck

      @Test @DisplayName("eliminateCurrentPlayer() sends cards to discard pile") void testEliminateCardsGoToDeck() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testGameNotOverAtStart

      @Test @DisplayName("Game is not over at the start") void testGameNotOverAtStart()

    • testGameEndsWithOnePlayer

      @Test @DisplayName("Game ends when only one player remains") void testGameEndsWithOnePlayer() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testGetWinnerNullDuringGame

      @Test @DisplayName("getWinner() returns null while game is in progress") void testGetWinnerNullDuringGame()

    • testGetWinnerAfterGameEnds

      @Test @DisplayName("getWinner() returns last remaining player after game ends") void testGetWinnerAfterGameEnds() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testNextTurnMarksGameOver

      @Test @DisplayName("nextTurn() marks game over when only one player remains") void testNextTurnMarksGameOver() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • testTableSumUpdatesAfterPlay

      @Test @DisplayName("getTableSum() returns updated sum after playing a card") void testTableSumUpdatesAfterPlay() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • forceTableSum

      private void forceTableSum(Game game, int targetSum)
      Forces the table sum to a specific value by directly manipulating the Table's addToSum method. Used to set up edge-case scenarios.

    • findLegalCardIndex

      private int findLegalCardIndex(IPlayer player, int currentSum)
      Returns the index of the first legally playable card in the hand, or -1 if none exists.

    • findIllegalCardIndex

      private int findIllegalCardIndex(IPlayer player, int currentSum)
      Returns the index of the first card that would be illegal to play, or -1 if all cards are legal.
